sub_modules.conv1d_window: Combinationally packs the current sample and four delayed samples into a 5-tap causal window.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac5: Combinational fixed 5-tap multiply-accumulate using kernel weights [2, 8, 12, 8, 2].
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Combinationally right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W to produce the normalized output.
